value.body:
## Context

Cycle is still a prototype. Desktop distribution needs repeatable packaging and verification before small teams can rely on it.

## Outcome

The project can produce signed desktop builds with documented release checks and a smoke-tested install/update path.

## Acceptance criteria

- Packaging supports target development platforms with documented prerequisites.
- Build output includes signed/notarized artifacts where required by platform policy.
- Auto-update strategy is chosen and documented, even if initially disabled behind a flag.
- Smoke tests cover first launch, onboarding, repository add, create issue, issue detail, agent provider detection, and shutdown.
- Release checklist includes typecheck, unit tests, Storybook build, desktop build, and manual smoke steps.

frontmatter.title: Add release packaging, signing, auto-update, and smoke verification

value.title: Add release packaging, signing, auto-update, and smoke verification
